message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title End Screen Action Sequences

actor User
participant "Game" as Game
participant "End" as End
participant "HighScore" as HighScore
participant "Start" as Start
participant "Navigation" as Navigation
participant "Settings" as Settings
participant "JoggleCube" as JoggleCube
participant "HighScores" as HighScores
participant "Score" as Score
participant "Cube" as Cube
participant "Block" as Block

box "Views" #LightBlue
  participant Game
  participant End
  participant HighScore
  participant Start
end box

box "User Interface Control" #LightBlue
  participant Navigation
end box

box "Back End" #LightPurple
  participant Settings
  participant JoggleCube
  participant HighScores
  participant Score
  participant Cube
  participant Block
end box

== High Score button clicked ==
User -> Game: btnHighScoreClicked()
activate Game
Game -> Navigation: show(ScreenType.HighScore)
activate Navigation
Navigation -> HighScore: prepView()
activate HighScore
HighScore -> JoggleCube: getOverallHighScores()
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> HighScores: getScores()
activate HighScores
HighScores --> JoggleCube: scores
deactivate HighScores
JoggleCube --> HighScore: scores
deactivate JoggleCube
HighScore -> JoggleCube: getCurrentCubeHighScores()
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> HighScores: getScores()
activate HighScores
HighScores --> JoggleCube: scores
deactivate HighScores
JoggleCube --> HighScore: scores
deactivate JoggleCube
HighScore --> Navigation: 
deactivate HighScore
Navigation --> Game: 
deactivate Navigation
Game -> Navigation: hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
activate Navigation
Navigation --> Game: 
deactivate Navigation
deactivate Game

== Menu Clicked ==
User -> Game: btnMenuClicked()
activate Game
Game -> Navigation: show(ScreenType.Start)
activate Navigation
Navigation -> Start: prepView()
activate Start
Start -> Settings: getCurrLang()
activate Settings
Settings --> Start: English
deactivate Settings
Start --> Navigation: 
deactivate Start
Navigation --> Game: 
deactivate Navigation
Game -> Navigation: hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
activate Navigation
Navigation --> Game: 
deactivate Navigation
deactivate Game

== Replay clicked ==
User -> Game: replayGrid()
activate Game
Game -> Navigation: show(ScreenType.GAME)
activate Navigation
Navigation -> Game: prepView()
activate Game
Game -> JoggleCube: getCubeData()
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> Cube: getCube()
activate Cube
Cube --> JoggleCube: cube[3][3][3]
deactivate Cube
JoggleCube --> Game: cube[3][3][3]
deactivate JoggleCube
deactivate Game
Game --> Navigation: 
deactivate Navigation
Game -> Navigation: hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
activate Navigation
Navigation --> Game: 
deactivate Navigation
deactivate Game

== Save Clicked ==
User -> Game: btnSaveClicked()
activate Game
Game -> JoggleCube: savGrid(filename)
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> Cube: saveCube(outfile)
activate Cube
loop foreach Block
    Cube -> Block: getLetter()
    activate Block
    Block --> Cube: 
    deactivate Block
end
Cube --> JoggleCube: 
deactivate Cube
JoggleCube -> Score: saveScore(outfile)
activate Score
loop foreach score
    Score -> Score: save(outfile)
end
Score --> JoggleCube: 
deactivate Score
JoggleCube --> Game: 
deactivate JoggleCube
deactivate Game

@enduml
```
